title: Tooltip
description: Dark surface (neutral-7) tooltip with caption text. Triggered by hovering the info icon (outline → filled on hover). Arrow points toward the trigger. Max-width 200px. Four placements: top, bottom, left, right. Persistent variant adds a close × button.
